notes: Rule-backed collections using SrcCollection_* require the later productSet import phase to add the same tag to products from source collection membership.
Collections with native product tag, product type, or price rules can populate immediately after product import without source membership tags.
Seasonal/campaign collections are retained in this report but are not added to the default approved map.
